decisions.what: Replaced contact section with comprehensive contact form
decisions.why: Specification required complete contact form with proper HTML5 structure including name, email, phone, investment interest level dropdown, and message fields with accessibility attributes

decisions.what: Added contact form styles with validation states
decisions.why: Specification required professional form styling with error/success states, responsive layout, loading button support, and consistent use of CSS custom properties

decisions.what: Used semantic form structure with form-group, form-label, form-input classes
decisions.why: Specification required structured layout with proper labeling and accessibility support

decisions.what: Implemented submit-button with loading state support
decisions.why: Specification required loading state support with button-text and button-loader elements

decisions.what: Added validation state styles with error and success classes
decisions.why: Specification required validation states with border colors and visual feedback
